evidence_summary: Establish the high-stakes ultimatum provided by the Wizard's messenger within the palace setting. The group transitions from the comfort of their lodging to the realization of a lethal requirement for their desires.
The group is lodged in the palace. They are informed that they may see the Wizard, but he will only grant their wishes if they first kill the Wicked Witch of the West.
The group is settled in the guest quarters, experiencing a moment of rest or anticipation.
The group is stunned and unsettled by the demand to kill the Wicked Witch.
green_girl delivers the Wizard's condition for granting wishes.
